api/asyncapi.title: AsyncAPI

api/openapi.description: All HTTP services must define their surface area in openapi.yaml.

architecture/data-flows.description: This file describes end-to-end flows with sequence diagrams.

architecture/identity-access.description: Identity is required for policy gating and auditability.

architecture/memory-model.title: Memory Model
architecture/memory-model.description: Memory is powerful and dangerous. This platform treats memory as a governed capability.

architecture/observability.title: Observability
architecture/observability.description: This platform must be observable by default.

architecture/overview.title: Architecture Overview
architecture/overview.description: This platform adds a cognitive personality layer and a governed tool runtime around LLM agents.

architecture/persona-system.description: Personas are versioned, composable artifacts that influence agent behavior.

architecture/policy-gates.description: Policy gating is the core safety feature of the platform.

architecture/release-distribution.description: This repo ships multiple artifact types.

architecture/security-model.description: This platform is security-critical because it mediates tool execution.

architecture/service-map.description: This document lists services, responsibilities, and dependencies.
